Liking
Most Common Mistakes
● Thinking that the #1 rule of sales is to get people to
like you when it's really the opposite. The #1 rule is to
first like your customers.
● False flattery is a good substitute for genuine
compliments.
● Yes, you can come to like someone you find very
objectionable. There is a simple way to do this.
● Thinking that it takes a lot of time to establish liking
in a relationship, and confusing it with the rational
way of liking somebody and being friends with
somebody.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 1 --
